mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.total_amount), 0) AS totalTradeVol, SUM(CASE WHEN t.instruction = 'BUY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS buyCount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.instruction = 'SELL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sellCount FROM tb_stock_transaction_log t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.execution_datetime >= #{startDate}
